---
title: "Video issue with intel core graphics controller, ASUS NB"
date: 2011-01-27
forum: Hardware
---

### Post by larrygingras on 2011-01-27
I have ASUS A42F notebook with intel core CPU so it uses intel core integrated graphics controller.

I've installed kubuntu 10.10 (32bit).

I have video problems with this configuration. Sometimes windows is not fully redrawn: for example, when I'm scrolling, I have some parts of text scrolled, and some not. Or popup menu failing to appear.

And more important (but much more seldom) that sometimes X completely hangs. Still I can switch to console and when I do I see "GPU hang" errors. But this happens not often, 1 time in 1 or 2 weeks maybe.

---
